# .github/workflows — CI/CD

GitHub Actions workflows for this repo. Currently one workflow: `divinecore-v2-ci.yml`.

## Workflows

| File | Trigger | Purpose |
|------|---------|---------|
| `divinecore-v2-ci.yml` | push/PR to `main` (path-filtered to `divinecore-v2/**` + the workflow file) and `workflow_dispatch` | Build divinecore-v2 api+worker images to GHCR + Discord notify on push |

## divinecore-v2-ci.yml structure

**Job 1 — `build-and-push`** (matrix: `api`, `worker`):
- Runs both components in parallel via matrix strategy
- Uses `docker/setup-buildx-action@v3` + `docker/build-push-action@v6`
- Pushes to `ghcr.io/onebox69/aios-divinecore/{api,worker}`
- Tags: `:latest` (main only), `:sha-<short>`, `:<branch>`
- GHA cache scoped per component (`scope=${name}`) — fast incremental rebuilds
- PRs are build-only (no GHCR push, no Discord ping) — gated on `github.event_name != 'pull_request'`

**Job 2 — `notify`**:
- Runs after `build-and-push`, only on `push` events
- Uses `sarisia/actions-status-discord@v1`
- Posts success/failure embed to `#deploys` via `DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL` secret
- Embed includes branch + commit message

## Required secrets

| Secret | Source | Purpose |
|--------|--------|---------|
| `GITHUB_TOKEN` | Provided automatically | GHCR auth |
| `DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL` | Repo settings → Secrets | Posts to `#deploys` channel |

## Permissions on build job

```yaml
contents: read
packages: write    # needed to push to GHCR
```

## Phase 2 — pending

SSH-deploy from CI to the Hostinger VPS (`srv1445995.hstgr.cloud`). Blocked on VPS access. Once unblocked: pull tagged image on VPS, swap container, health-check.

## Adding a new workflow

- Name it `<scope>-<purpose>.yml` (e.g. `pulse-deploy.yml`).
- Use `paths:` filters to scope triggers — don't run a Branding OS workflow on every Pulse commit.
- Match the existing notify pattern so all builds report to `#deploys` consistently.
